## What changed

Describe the problem and the smallest coherent change that addresses it.

## Why this belongs in GuanZai

Explain how the change improves routing value, safety, provider neutrality, memory quality, or user clarity.

## Verification

- [ ] `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v`
- [ ] `python3 -m build`
- [ ] Documentation and translations are updated when behavior changes.
- [ ] No credentials, private prompts, personal data, or local `.guanzai/` memory are included.
- [ ] New provider/model behavior preserves the no-Fast policy and exposes capability limits honestly.

## Notes for reviewers

Call out risk, compatibility, migration, or unresolved tradeoffs. For consequential policy changes, include independent review evidence.
